iterations.notes: Optimization 1: Merged synthesise+complete into single phase (3 phases), streamlined gather-diff instructions for parallel tool calls, sub-agents read diff from context instead of running git diff, added synthesise_review action to workflow extension

context.diff:
See diff.patch artifact. 13 files changed, 2310 insertions(+), 565 deletions(-). Key changes:
1. .pi/extensions/workflow.ts: Added synthesise_review action (~185 lines) for server-side finding merge
2. src/server/server.ts: Removed delegate-logs API endpoint (-39 lines)
3. src/server/workflows/definitions/code-review.ts: Reduced from 4 to 3 phases, streamlined instructions, sub-agents read diff from context
4. src/server/workflows/engine.ts: Added batchOperations() and synthesiseFindings() methods (+188 lines)
5. src/server/workflows/log-viewer.ts: DELETED (-304 lines)
6. src/server/ws/handler.ts: Added getRunner() helper, workflow_synthesise_review and workflow_batch WS commands (+88 lines)
7. src/server/ws/protocol.ts: Added workflow_batch and workflow_synthesise_review message types
8. src/ui/components/WorkflowStatusBar.ts: Refactored sub-agent status tracking, removed artifact-based log viewing (-142 lines net)
9. src/ui/tools/renderers/DelegateRenderer.ts: Simplified renderSessionLink call
10. src/ui/tools/renderers/delegate-cards.ts: Removed delegateId fallback from renderSessionLink
11. tests/code-review-e2e.ts: New E2E test harness (381 lines)
12. tests/code-review-progress.html: Performance report (193 lines)
13. tests/code-review-results.json: Raw timing data (1199 lines)
